key.name: pinned-apps
key.description: List of desktop file IDs pinned to the dock.

key.name: dock-position
key.description: Position of the dock (bottom, left, right)

key.name: dock-autohide
key.description: When enabled, the dock hides automatically when not in use.

key.name: dock-intellihide
key.description: Hide the dock when a window is maximized on the same monitor.

key.name: panel-flat
key.description: When enabled, the top panel has a solid black background instead of being transparent.

key.name: dock-gap
key.description: Gap in pixels between the dock and the screen edge, and between windows and the dock.

key.name: dock-magnification
key.description: Magnify dock icons on hover, macOS-style.

key.name: dock-extended-mode
key.description: Show window titles next to icons in panel mode.

key.name: recent-wallpapers
key.summary: List of recently used wallpaper URIs

key.name: custom-shortcuts
key.summary: Map of action names to custom accelerator strings

key.name: theme-mode
key.description: Theme mode (system, light, dark)

key.name: dark-mode
key.description: Whether dark mode is enabled.

key.name: developer-mode
key.description: Whether the Developer settings page is shown.

key.name: singularity-theme
key.description: Name of the user theme to apply to Singularity apps. Must have a singularity/style.css inside a standard theme directory. Empty string means the built-in default theme.

key.name: dynamic-workspaces
key.description: Whether to automatically create/destroy workspaces.

key.name: workspace-count
key.description: Number of workspaces when dynamic mode is disabled.

key.name: sound-output-device
key.description: ID of the selected sound output device.

key.name: keyboard-layout
key.description: Selected keyboard layout ID.

key.name: keyboard-repeat
key.description: Whether to enable keyboard repeat.

key.name: accent-color
key.description: The accent color used by the desktop (blue, teal, green, yellow, orange, red, pink, purple, slate, wallpaper, custom).

key.name: custom-accent-color
key.description: Hex color (#rrggbb) used when accent-color is set to 'custom'.

key.name: show-desktop-icons
key.description: Whether to show icons on the desktop from ~/Desktop folder.

key.name: settings-in-window
key.description: When enabled, the Settings button opens a dedicated Settings window instead of using the sidebar.

key.name: high-contrast
key.description: Whether high contrast mode is enabled.

key.name: large-text
key.description: Whether large text mode is enabled.

key.name: screen-reader-enabled
key.description: Whether the screen reader (orca) is enabled.

key.name: gamemode-auto
key.description: Automatically activate Game Mode when a fullscreen game is detected

key.name: mangohud-auto
key.description: Inject MangoHud overlay when launching games

key.name: tiling-enabled
key.description: Whether tiling window management is enabled.

key.name: preview-features-enabled
key.description: Whether experimental features are visible.

key.name: enabled-plugins
key.description: List of enabled plugin module names.

key.name: dock-pinned-suffixes
key.summary: Dock items with pinned (always-expanded) suffix widgets
key.description: App ids whose dock-item suffix area stays expanded without hover.

key.name: force-ssd
key.description: Forces Server Side Decorations (SSD) by disabling CSD in GTK and Qt apps.

key.name: legacy-titlebar
key.description: Show a classic static titlebar with inline buttons instead of the floating hover window controls. Ignored when force-ssd is enabled.

key.name: window-rounded-corners
key.description: Round the corners of non-maximized, non-tiled app windows.

key.name: app-launcher-mode
key.description: Mode of the app launcher (fullscreen, menu)

key.name: switcher-style
key.description: Layout style of the Alt+Tab switcher: 'list' (vertical, icon+title) or 'grid' (horizontal icons)

key.name: do-not-disturb
key.description: When enabled, notifications are suppressed.

key.name: active-window-title
key.description: Title of the currently focused window. Updated by the shell.

key.name: window-states
key.description: Per-app window size and maximized state, keyed by application ID.

key.name: shell-monitor
key.summary: Connector name of the monitor where shell windows spawn (e.g. DP-1). Empty = auto.

key.name: dock-multi-monitor
key.description: When enabled, the dock appears on every connected monitor.

key.name: panel-multi-monitor
key.description: When enabled, the top panel appears on every connected monitor.

key.name: app-folders
key.description: JSON object mapping folder IDs to {name, apps:[]} structures.

key.name: app-grid-order
key.description: Ordered list of grid item keys for the overview: app IDs, folder:<id> entries, and widget:<instance_id> entries (Android-style mixed grid).

key.name: dock-resources
key.description: List of URIs pinned to the dock - files, folders, and web links dropped onto the dock à la macOS. Membership only; ordering lives in dock-order.

key.name: dock-order
key.description: Interleaved order of the dock's pinned section: entries are pin:<app-id> and res:<uri>. Lets apps and dropped resources be reordered relative to each other. Items not listed fall back to their own settings' order.

key.name: overview-widgets
key.description: Tuples (instance_id, provider_id, width, height, config_json) describing each placed widget. width/height are in grid cells (e.g. 2x1, 2x2). config_json is provider-specific JSON-encoded state.

key.name: clock-use-12h
key.description: When enabled, the clock shows AM/PM instead of 24-hour time.

key.name: extreme-mode-active
key.description: When enabled, reduces power consumption for AMOLED displays by enforcing dark theme and minimizing brightness.

key.name: extreme-mode-saved-dark-mode
key.summary: Saved dark mode preference before extreme mode

key.name: extreme-mode-saved-animations
key.summary: Saved animations preference before extreme mode
